ogTitle: Lake Gairdner vs Lake Gilles: Climate Safety

heading: Lake Gairdner vs Lake Gilles — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lake Gairdner, South Australia and Lake Gilles, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lake Gilles has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Lake Gairdner (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lake Gairdner or Lake Gilles safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lake Gairdner has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Lake Gilles scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lake Gairdner scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Lake Gilles scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lake Gairdner or Lake Gilles?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lake Gilles has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.53% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
